$description.value: AI Agent — chat interface, context buttons, and error states. Figma: 'Ai Agent' page.
Alerts — Core, Dismissable, Multi-line, Toast. Values verified against Figma 'Alerts' page.
Toast Alert — floating, radius 8px. Figma: r:8

colorPalette.description: Auto-assigned background colors for stacked/group avatars when no image is provided

$description.value: Avatar tokens — single sm/md/lg, status dots, stacked group with overflow
Badges — verified against Figma 'Badges' page. 3 component sets: Assignment Status, Status Badges, List Badges.
Assignment Status Badges — fill:#fffbf2, stroke:#ffb000, radius:3. States: Not Started, In Progress, In Progress #%, Completed
Status Badges — radius:4, 20px tall, 12px SemiBold. States: Processing, Shipped, Pending, Under Contract
List type pill badges — radius:40 (pill), uppercase, 12px Bold, 27px tall. Colors: purple, blue, red, green, orange, gray

itemSpacing.description: Horizontal gap between label and chevron

backIconColor.description: Back chevron < color in stacked/mobile variant

stackedFontSize.description: Larger font size used in stacked/page-header variant

stackedFontWeight.description: Light weight for stacked variant headings

stackedActiveLinkColor.description: Active level link color in stacked variant

stackedCurrentColor.description: Current page color in stacked variant

$description.value: PartsSource Button component tokens
Button/Primary — filled blue CTA. States: Normal/Hover/Pressed/Disabled
Button/Secondary — outlined button (LG=50px, SM=32px)
Button/Tertiary/LG — pill ghost button, #f1f1f1 bg
Button/Pill/Desktop — legacy orange pill (48px). New work: use button.primary.
Button/SquareLG + Button/SquareSM — LEGACY orange CTA buttons. Being phased out; use button.primary for new work.

background.description: Legacy orange — do not use in new components
Legacy orange — do not use in new components

$description.value: Button/ChipSM + Button/ChipLG — filter chip toggles and removable tags (with ⊗ dismiss icon)
Button/ChipSM + ChipLG with ⊗ dismiss icon — used as filter tags that can be removed
Button/Segmented/Asset + Event + Left + Right — tab-style segmented control
Button/Inline — text-only link-style button. Variants: default (blue text), underline, allCaps, director (with trailing arrow chevron).
Button/Inline/Underline — always-underlined text link
Button/Inline/AllCaps — uppercase bold inline label
Arrow — directional navigation button. Two variants: default (boxed with background) and ghost (icon only, no container).
Naked arrow — icon only, no background box. Used inline or in tight layouts.
Cards — 6 Figma component sets (Event, AI Data, Status, Data, List, Analytics)
Event Card — 317px wide, footer with Azure Blue link
Ai Data Card — Type: Delivery/Request/Ai/Quote/Order. States: Default/Hover/Selected
Status Card — compact 220×73px horizontal card
Data Card — max 620px, label/value pairs with status bar
List Card — list-style row card
Analytics Card — metric display card
Carousel — informative content slider. Figma: 'Carousel' page.

itemAddToBtnBg.description: Legacy orange CTA — deprecated for new work, use #005BA6 instead

$description.value: Cart icon badge and item card tokens — includes legacy orange CTA note
Check Box — 24×24px. States: Default/Disabled/Selected/Completed (Check Boxes page)

itemHeight.description: Height of each menu item row

itemIconColor.description: Leading icon color on default items

destructiveColor.description: Text color for destructive actions (Delete, Remove)

$description.value: Data Visualization tokens — shared palette + per-chart-type overrides. Covers all 15 chart families in the Figma Data Visualization section.
Bar Charts — Horizontal, Stacked, Vertical, Grouped
Line & Area Charts — Line, Multi-Line, Area, Stacked Area
Pie · Donut · Waffle — Pie, Donut, Multi-Ring, Exploded Pie, Waffle, Gauge

innerRadius.description: 0 = full pie; set to 0.6 for donut

$description.value: Scatter · Bubble · Radar — Scatter Plot, Bubble Chart, Radar Chart, Radar + Scatter Combo
Heatmap — Time Pattern Heatmap, Correlation Matrix
Funnel · Treemap — Funnel Chart, Treemap
Bump · Stream — Bump Chart, Stream Chart
Sankey · Chord — Sankey Diagram, Chord Diagram
Calendar · Swarm Plot — Calendar Heatmap, Swarm Plot
Sunburst · Circle Packing — Sunburst Chart, Circle Packing
Parallel Coords · Network — Parallel Coordinates, Network Graph
Box Plot · Marimekko — Box Plot, Marimekko Chart
Geo & Choropleth — US Regions Map, Choropleth Map
Voronoi Diagram — Voronoi Diagram, Filled Zone Voronoi
Bullet Chart — Bullet Chart, Multi-Row Bullet
Divider — horizontal or vertical separator line.
Divider with centered label text

width.description: Default drawer width — forms, quick actions, contextual detail

widthWide.description: Wide variant — complex forms, multi-step flows

borderRadius.description: Flush edges — no radius on drawer panel

headerBorderColor.description: 1px bottom border separating header from body

closeButtonSize.description: X close button width and height

bodyPadding.description: Body scrollable area padding on all sides

footerBorderColor.description: 1px top border separating footer from body

footerButtonGap.description: Gap between Cancel and primary action button

sectionHeaderColor.description: Section label color in detail views (e.g. ITEM DETAILS, AVAILABILITY)

sectionHeaderSize.description: Section label font size — uppercase small caps

titleColor.description: Heading text for all empty state variants

iconSize.description: Icon size inside circle — large variant

iconSizeSm.description: Icon size inside circle — small/compact variant

neutralIconBg.description: Gray circle bg — No results found variant

neutralIconColor.description: Gray search icon — No results found

infoIconBg.description: Light blue circle bg — No data available and Get started variants

infoIconColor.description: Azure Blue icon — No data / Get started

errorIconBg.description: Pink circle bg — Something went wrong variant

spacing.description: Vertical gap between icon, title, description, button

primaryButtonVariant.description: Get started and Something went wrong use filled blue primary button

neutralButtonVariant.description: No results found uses outlined button (e.g. CHECKOUT AS A GUEST)

noDataButtonVariant.description: No data available has no action button

containerPadding.description: Inner padding of the white card container

inlineBorderColor.description: Red border on invalid input fields

inlineFontSize.description: Error message font size below input

inlineFontWeight.description: Regular weight for inline error text

inlineIconGap.description: Gap between error icon and message text

inlineMarginTop.description: Space between input field and error message

fieldLabelErrorColor.description: Floating label color when field has an error

$description.value: File Upload — drag-and-drop zone and file attachment input.
Filter — Filter bar + Filter Breakpoints (2 Figma component sets)
Filter — container bar across all breakpoints
Filter — no filters applied
Filter — active chips shown
Filter — dropdown open state
Filter — saved filter set selected state
Lucide icons — standard sizes and default stroke
Custom Icons — PartsSource-specific UI SVG icons. Source: src/assets/icons/custom/. 5 style variants: line, squareFilled, squareOutline, circleFilled, circleOutline.
Bare icon — no container background.
White icon on brand-primary square background — 4px radius
Brand-primary icon on white square with brand border — 4px radius
White icon on brand-primary circle background
Brand-primary icon on white circle with brand border

strokeWidth.description: SVG stroke width for custom icons

$description.value: Line Art — detailed white outline illustration scenes. Source: src/assets/icons/line-art/. Used for feature highlights, empty states, marketing moments.
Line art color roles — applied via currentColor on the SVG

default.description: White — original design color, use on dark backgrounds

brand.description: Brand blue — use on light backgrounds

subtle.description: Muted gray — de-emphasized or disabled state

$description.value: Optional dark background container for line art display

background.description: Deep navy — matches the dark bg line art is designed for

$description.value: Modality Icons — PartsSource medical equipment custom SVG icons. Source: src/assets/icons/modality/. 5 style variants: line, squareFilled, squareOutline, circleFilled, circleOutline.
Bare icon — no container background.
White icon on brand-primary square background — 4px radius
Brand-primary icon on white square with brand border — 4px radius
White icon on brand-primary circle background
Brand-primary icon on white circle with brand border

strokeWidth.description: SVG stroke width for modality icons

$description.value: Pictograms — detailed blue and white illustrated scenes. Source: src/assets/icons/pictograms/. Colors are intentional design colors baked into SVGs — do not override with currentColor.

xl.description: Extra large — empty state / onboarding hero

$description.value: Optional container — pictograms work on light or dark backgrounds
Form Components page — 7 component sets
Input Fields — 48px floating-label text input
Large Input Fields — 80px height, same states as input
Dropdown Menu — 48px, chevron-down icon right-pinned
Dropdown with text input inside
Date Picker — single date + range variants
Checkbox-Short — compact inline checkbox
Checkbox-Long — full-width checkbox row
Checkmark-Text-Number — numbered list checkbox
List card tokens — default, sort, badge-pill, and empty-state variants
Modal/dialog tokens — standard, confirm, loading, and multi-step variants
Left navigation panel tokens — expanded/collapsed states, header, submenus
Top Navigation bar — blue header. Figma: Navigation/TopNav. Contains: logo, search, cart, notifications, user account.
PartsSource logo / wordmark area
Search bar in top nav
Action icons in top nav (cart, bell, help, etc.)

hitArea.description: Minimum touch target wrapping the icon

$description.value: Notification count badge on cart / bell icons
User account button / avatar in top nav
Dropdown menu that appears below top nav items
Navigation — Left Hand Nav + Top Nav (2 Figma component sets)
Left Hand Navigation — dark sidebar. States: Default/Default Closed/Name Select
Top Nav bar — blue header
Page Shell — responsive layout shell (1920/1440/Tablet/Mobile)
Pagination — page navigation for tables, search results, and list views.
Items per page selector
Popover — floating panel anchored to a trigger. Richer than tooltip; can contain actions.
Progress Indicator — linear bar and circular spinner variants.
Multi-step progress (Step Progress component)

control.description: Width and height of the radio circle

touchTarget.description: Minimum WCAG touch target — make label clickable

hover.description: Legacy orange — new work should use #005BA6

selected.description: Legacy orange fill — prefer #005BA6 for new work

selectedNew.description: Preferred blue fill for new designs

$description.value: Search Bar — 5 variants: global (top nav), inline (card/list), within (filter facet), collapsed (icon-only), srp (search results page)
Global search — top nav, queries entire catalog. 40px input + 48px submit button.
Orange submit button — right-side, 48px wide
Inline search — card/page context (Asset Inventory, list views). 40px, transparent icon button, no submit.
Transparent icon button, 42px, left-aligned
Search-within — filter facet / long dropdown lists. 32px, right-side glyph, no submit button.
Search glyph inside the stroke on right side
Collapsed / icon-only — dense headers like My Lists. 36×36 transparent button, expands on click.
Search Results Page search — sits with Categories header. 40px, 5px radius, #CCCCCC border, orange button.
Typeahead / autocomplete dropdown — shared across global + inline variants
Tokens shared across all search variants
Skeleton Screens — loading placeholders that mimic content layout.

textLine.description: Height of a single text skeleton line

$description.value: Slider — range input control.
Stepper — 4 Figma component sets: bar, Indicator, Step, (Stepper wrapper)
Connector bar between steps
Step circle indicator — Finished/Current/Future
Full step = indicator + label + connector bar. Property 1=position (Start/End), Property 2=state (Start/Current/Finished)
Tabs — horizontal navigation within a page section. PS Figma: ' Tabs' page.
Toast notification tokens — error, info, success, and warning variants
Tooltip — contextual helper text on hover/focus. Dark gray background, 4px radius. Figma: fill #323232

background.description: Figma exact: #323232 (dark gray, not midnight navy)

medium.description: Interactive elements, focus rings, primary buttons

500.description: Azure Blue / Cyan — info, link hover, accent

$description.value: Breakpoint System — verified against Figma 'Grids' page. Column counts, gutters, and margins for each breakpoint.

gutter.description: Universal column gutter — 30px across all breakpoints

$description.value: 360dp — Mobile small. 2 cols, 20px margin, stretch.
550dp — Mobile large. 2 cols, 20px margin, stretch.
768dp — Tablet. 6 cols, 50px margin, stretch.
820dp — Tablet landscape. 6 cols, 50px margin, stretch.
1150dp — Small desktop. 12 cols, 50px margin, stretch.
1440dp — Standard desktop. 12 cols, 50px margin, stretch.
1630dp — Large desktop. 12 cols, 50px margin, stretch.
1920dp — Wide / full HD. 12 cols centered, 100px column width, 30px gutter.
3840dp — 4K. 12 cols centered, 100px column width, 30px gutter.

pill.description: Fully pill — tertiary buttons, pill badges

none.description: No border — transparent button, ghost element

emphasis.description: Active nav indicator, selected state emphasis

primary.description: All primary interactive elements, CTAs, links

accent.description: Azure Blue — info state, link hover, gradient accent

light.description: Brand light blue — info borders, accent badge backgrounds

tint.description: Faintest brand tint — 'New' badge background, hover fills

hoverDark.description: Darker blue for hover/pressed on primary interactive elements

hover.description: Subtle hover tint on light surfaces

default.description: Default white surface — buttons, inputs, cards

subtle.description: Subtle tinted surface — tertiary button, chip, disabled

muted.description: Muted fill — tertiary button, disabled input

default.description: Card borders, dividers, inputs at rest — #DCDCDC

successDark.description: Dark green — success alert text/icon (Figma exact: #0e7c55)

dangerDark.description: Dark red — error alert text/icon (Figma exact: #e00000)

warningDark.description: Dark amber — warning alert text/icon (Figma exact: #b45309)

disabled.description: Disabled state — applied to entire disabled component

hover.description: Subtle hover fade on images or ghost elements

invisible.description: Fully transparent — visually hidden but present in DOM

xs.description: Small chip, small secondary button, small square button

md.description: Chip LG, segmented control, small arrow button

xl.description: Secondary button LG, large square button

$description.value: Level 2 — Describes intent. References primitive tokens only. Tells what a token is FOR.
